en: The book is on the table.
The cat is under the chair.
The key is in the box.
The picture is on the wall.
The bird is in the tree.
The school is next to the park.

zh: 超市在银行和邮局之间。
en: The supermarket is between the bank and the post office.
My schoolbag is behind the door.
The cat is in front of the sofa.
He is standing beside me.
The meeting starts at eight in the morning.
She has English class on Monday.
We have winter holiday in January.
He arrives at three in the afternoon.
She goes shopping at the weekend.
I like swimming in summer.
They watch TV in the evening.
I get up at seven in the morning.
She was born in 2010.

zh: 我们在圣诞节交换礼物。
en: We exchange gifts at Christmas.
He walked to school.
She came back from the library.
The cat jumped off the chair.
They walked into the classroom.
The bird flew out of the cage.
I write with a pencil.

zh: 她和朋友一起去了公园。
en: She went to the park with her friend.
This gift is for you.
He goes to school by bike.

zh: 我们谈论了很多关于学校的事情。
en: We talked about many things about school.
